title: Motorcycle Drive Force
body: A powerful motorcycle can produce an acceleration of $$3.50$$ $$\frac{m}{s^2}$$ while traveling at $$90.0$$ $$\frac{km}{h}$$. At that speed, the forces resisting motion, including friction and air resistance, total $$400.0$$ N. The mass of the motorcycle with rider is $$245$$ kg.
